summary.boundary: Decision ledger organizes current evidence and blockers; it does not create new DEM, pressure-flow or submission evidence.

rows.route: Chemical Engineering Science bounded mechanism paper
rows.current_blocker: administrative confirmations and public repository DOI
rows.go_condition: All admin blockers resolved; manuscript keeps pressure-free and pre-clogging boundaries.
rows.no_go_condition: Any declaration, repository DOI or corresponding-author metadata remains unconfirmed.
rows.next_action: Resolve repository DOI/accession and author metadata; repeat-seed uncertainty is now available.

rows.route: Chemical Engineering Science with repeat-seed uncertainty
rows.current_blocker: administrative confirmations and public repository DOI
rows.go_condition: Final restart files exist, protected pipeline post-processes full dumps, and uncertainty can be inserted without changing claims.
rows.no_go_condition: Repeat runs fail, remain incomplete or contradict the current near-threshold mechanism.
rows.next_action: Resolve admin metadata and keep repeat wording bounded to stochastic variability.

rows.current_blocker: validation-grade flow or experimental evidence missing
rows.go_condition: Validation-grade OpenFOAM/OpenLB/LBM or experimental pressure evidence supports process-performance claims and repeat uncertainty is available.
rows.no_go_condition: Only bounded cropped-domain pressure checks are available, or repeat evidence remains unavailable.
rows.next_action: Do not target CEJ until pressure-flow evidence is upgraded beyond bounded cropped-domain screening.
